federations.name: Namibia Futsal
federations.phoneNote: NFA website lists +261 265 691; likely typo — Namibia is +264
federations.address: Football House, ERF 339, Richard Kamuhuka Street, Katutura, Windhoek, Namibia
federations.notes: Administered by NFA. NFA social: @Official_NFA (Twitter), namibiafootballassociation (Instagram)

federations.name: Namibia Beach Volleyball
federations.notes: NVF governs indoor and beach volleyball. President: Hillary Imbuwa

federations.name: Bowls Namibia
federations.notes: NNOC affiliated. Officials: Colin Peake (Competition Secretary), Lesley Vermeulen (Press Officer). Google Site may require login for contact info.

federations.name: Namibia Aquatics
federations.address: Erf 2, Corner General Murtala Muhammed Avenue & Khan Street, Eros, Windhoek, Namibia
federations.notes: Governs swimming, water polo, masters, open water. President: Riaan Steyn. NNOC lists as Namibia Swimming Federation. Hours: Mon–Sat 8:00–17:00

federations.name: Namibia Cycling Federation
federations.notes: President: Axel Theissen. NNOC affiliated. Contact form on website

federations.name: Squash Rackets Namibia
federations.notes: President: Tiego Rabasha. Chairperson: Adri Lambert. No federation-level contact published; use affiliate club for enquiries

federations.name: Namibia Triathlon Federation
federations.notes: Governs triathlon, duathlon, aquathlon. SG@ntf.go.na for athletes competing outside Namibia. Coach contacts on website

sources: Namibian news (Namibian Sun, The Namibian, Republikein)
World Triathlon, Namibia Paralympics, Bank Windhoek
